ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Ferris for Cathaline Campos.

Mr. Ferris stated that the only asset is the Decedent's home, that the Decedent's two disabled adult Children still live in the home and that the intent was to keep the home for them to continue living there. In addition, Mr. Ferris stated that the home was appraised at $700,000.00, that there is an existing mortgage of $100,000.00, that the only hold up is the costs for administration, that the Client was told by the lender that they will not give her a loan because title is not in her name and that his Client is willing to obtain a loan on her own personal property. The Court stated that the Estate needs to be closed, questioned if the other three Children can pay for administration costs, whether the five adult Children and the five adult Grandchildren want to be on title, and suggested that Counsel talk to the Family as to how title is to be held. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to September 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see where things stand.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Mar-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Ferris for Cathy Campos (Petitioner).

Mr. Ferris stated that his Client needed to obtain a loan to pay for administration, that the delay was due to his Client having surgery and that he should have the Petition for Final Distribution within 60-days. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution or a Report on Status of Administration was continued to March 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
